Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Jenna Swaney, Esq. for Plaintiff 121 9th Street/788 Minna Street Owners' Association, a California Nonprofit mutual benefit corporation on behalf of itself and in its representative capacity on behalf of its members via Zoom Video Webinar.
Michael Miller, Esq. for Defendant 121 Ninth, LLC via Zoom Video Webinar.
Mark Murray, Esq. for Defendant Rohan, Wallace & Aherene via Zoom Call.

Hearing held.

Plaintiff states that plaintiff does not represent individuals but the homeowners association. Plaintiff argues and offers proof. Plaintiff seeks clarification on the tentative ruling.
Defendant states the issues in dispute.
Matter is argued.
The matter of sanctions is argued.

After hearing the arguments, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR ISSUE SANCTIONS, MONETARY SANCTIONS AND ALTERNATIVELY, FURTHER RESPONSES

is GRANTED as follows: (1) no later than January 16, 2026 Plaintiff to provide complete verified response by HOA members/unit owners impacted by solar gain overheating and cracking; and produce all documents that are identified in those responses, if any; and (2) for any unit/member that complete verified responses with production are not provided, issue sanctions are granted as reqeusted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $4,750 granted to Rohan, Wallace and Ahrene Inc and $3,500 to 121 Ninth LLC.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Objecting To Proposed Discovery Order Of Special Master Dated 7.29.25
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Continued To Oct-17-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: CROSS COMPLAINANTS' MOTION OBJECTING TO PROPOSED DISCOVERY ORDER OF SPECIAL MASTER

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: continued to October 17, 2025. No later than by noon on October 10, 2025 each party to submit a supplemental brief limited to the following:
(1) Is Plaintiff pursuing any claims on behalf of individual units? Yes or No;
(2) If "Yes" list the claims and identify specific allegations in the Complaint (any other pleading on file) by page and line number;
(3) Is Plaintiff pursuing any claims "of Solar Gain overheating in an undetermined number of units" (See Points and Authorities re: Objection 3:13). Yes or No;
(4) If Yes, (a) is this a claim re: common areas or individual units; (b) identify specific allegations in the Complaint (any other pleading on file) by page and line number pertaining to this claim;
(5) Is Plaintiff pursuing any claims of water damage to the floor in Unit 404" (See Points and Authorities re: Objection 3:14). Yes or No;
(6) If Yes, (a) is this a claim re: common areas or individual units; (b) identify specific allegations in the Complaint (any other pleading on file) by page and line number pertaining to this claim;
(7) Is Plaintiff pursuing any claims of " anil pops and cracking in the wall finish in an undermined number of units" (See Points and Authorities re: Objection 3:15). Yes or No;
(8) If Yes, (a) is this a claim re: common areas or individual units; (b) identify specific allegations in the Complaint (any other pleading on file) by page and line number pertaining to this claim;

No additional argument shall be included in the briefs. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
